name: Personal Assistant — Gmail + Calendar + Sheets daily brief to Slack
description: Gathers today's Gmail inbox, Google Calendar events, and key data from Sheets, uses Claude AI to generate a personalized daily briefing, and posts it to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Build a personal assistant with Google Gemini, Gmail and Calendar using MCP

gmailListKey.description: Gmail connection key for listing emails

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for tasks/data

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for the daily brief

steps.name: Compile all data sources for briefing
Run Claude AI to generate daily brief
Parse Claude output and strip code fences
Build Slack Block Kit daily brief
